## PRD requirement(s)

<!-- IDs from docs/prd, e.g. FR-5.1.3, SEC-14.8.2, UX-6.4.2 -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Linked the PRD requirement ID(s) above
- [ ] Tests added/updated (unit / integration / e2e as appropriate)
- [ ] **Accessibility** checked — keyboard, focus, contrast, WCAG 2.2 AA (no a11y regressions)
- [ ] **Security** considered — input validation, authz/RLS, no PII in logs, no secrets committed
- [ ] **Copy tone** — trauma-aware, calibrated, routes to official orgs, "not legal advice" where relevant
- [ ] `npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build` pass locally
- [ ] Screenshots / recordings for UI changes (desktop + mobile)
